title: stelmesus stellatus
side_effects: Stelmesus stellatus can have side effects if used improperly, such as excessive vomiting, diarrhea, and dizziness due to its toxic properties. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxins may also lead to kidney damage and liver failure in severe cases. Additionally, improper use of the plant may cause allergic reactions, including skin irritation, itching, and respiratory problems. It is essential to handle and consume the plant with caution, following proper preparation and dosage guidelines to minimize the risk of these side effects.
